name: pull request from feature to dev
on:
  push:
    branches: ['feat*']
    paths: 
    - 'auth-service/**'
    - '.github/workflows/ci-pr-auth-service.yml'
  
  pull_request:
     branches: ["develop"]
     paths: 
      - 'auth-service/**'
permissions:
  id-token: write
  contents: read
  security-events: write
  actions: read

jobs:
  pr-check:
    name: pr pull
    uses: ./.github/workflows/_java-pr-check.yml  
    with:
     project: pharma
     environments: dev
     servicedir: auth-service
